## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration opportunities between GrowthX and Ash Read](https://fathom.video/share/yZ6kpyjqUapYeXEKbokzgp2DGbiXQYKq?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is experiencing rapid growth (11M+ revenue) and seeking high-quality content strategists](https://fathom.video/share/yZ6kpyjqUapYeXEKbokzgp2DGbiXQYKq?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [Ash is currently managing Wellworthy and 2 clients, billing \~20k/month](https://fathom.video/share/yZ6kpyjqUapYeXEKbokzgp2DGbiXQYKq?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
  - [Two potential collaboration models discussed: full-time role or platform-based partnership](https://fathom.video/share/yZ6kpyjqUapYeXEKbokzgp2DGbiXQYKq?tab=summary&timestamp=1231.0)
  - [GrowthX offers competitive compensation (200k+ range) with equity for director-level roles](https://fathom.video/share/yZ6kpyjqUapYeXEKbokzgp2DGbiXQYKq?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Current Business Situation

  - [Experiencing rapid growth, crossing 11M+ in revenue](https://fathom.video/share/yZ6kpyjqUapYeXEKbokzgp2DGbiXQYKq?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [In the process of raising Series B funding](https://fathom.video/share/yZ6kpyjqUapYeXEKbokzgp2DGbiXQYKq?tab=summary&timestamp=54.0)
  - [Facing challenges finding strategists who understand quality, strategy, and client communication](https://fathom.video/share/yZ6kpyjqUapYeXEKbokzgp2DGbiXQYKq?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [Projecting 45-50M revenue next year with potential for significant valuation increase](https://fathom.video/share/yZ6kpyjqUapYeXEKbokzgp2DGbiXQYKq?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)

### Ash's Current Work Setup

  - [Managing Wellworthy and two high-value clients](https://fathom.video/share/yZ6kpyjqUapYeXEKbokzgp2DGbiXQYKq?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [Billing approximately 20k/month](https://fathom.video/share/yZ6kpyjqUapYeXEKbokzgp2DGbiXQYKq?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
  - [Providing comprehensive content services, including SEO, newsletters, and podcast production](https://fathom.video/share/yZ6kpyjqUapYeXEKbokzgp2DGbiXQYKq?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [Charging 8,500/month for 10 pieces of content (one client example)](https://fathom.video/share/yZ6kpyjqUapYeXEKbokzgp2DGbiXQYKq?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)

### Content Marketing Industry Trends

  - [Increasing demand for SEO and content marketing services](https://fathom.video/share/yZ6kpyjqUapYeXEKbokzgp2DGbiXQYKq?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
  - [Newsletters becoming a popular request from clients](https://fathom.video/share/yZ6kpyjqUapYeXEKbokzgp2DGbiXQYKq?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
  - [Daily publishing emerging as a key strategy for success](https://fathom.video/share/yZ6kpyjqUapYeXEKbokzgp2DGbiXQYKq?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)

### Collaboration Possibilities

1.  Full-time role at GrowthX:
    
      - [Managing Director position](https://fathom.video/share/yZ6kpyjqUapYeXEKbokzgp2DGbiXQYKq?tab=summary&timestamp=1231.0)
      - [Compensation in 200k+ range with equity](https://fathom.video/share/yZ6kpyjqUapYeXEKbokzgp2DGbiXQYKq?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
      - [Potential to bring existing clients into GrowthX's model](https://fathom.video/share/yZ6kpyjqUapYeXEKbokzgp2DGbiXQYKq?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)

2.  Platform-based partnership:
    
      - [Using GrowthX's tools and resources](https://fathom.video/share/yZ6kpyjqUapYeXEKbokzgp2DGbiXQYKq?tab=summary&timestamp=1129.0)
      - [Currently not feasible due to rapid platform evolution](https://fathom.video/share/yZ6kpyjqUapYeXEKbokzgp2DGbiXQYKq?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
      - [Potential for future exploration as self-serve options develop](https://fathom.video/share/yZ6kpyjqUapYeXEKbokzgp2DGbiXQYKq?tab=summary&timestamp=1674.0)

### GrowthX's Service Model Evolution

  - [Shifted from volume-based pricing to workstream-based model](https://fathom.video/share/yZ6kpyjqUapYeXEKbokzgp2DGbiXQYKq?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
  - [Current pricing: 15k per workstream, 20-30k for strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/yZ6kpyjqUapYeXEKbokzgp2DGbiXQYKq?tab=summary&timestamp=843.0)
  - [Offering comprehensive services: strategy, content, workflows, daily publishing, graphics, optimization, audits, LLM tracking](https://fathom.video/share/yZ6kpyjqUapYeXEKbokzgp2DGbiXQYKq?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)

### Challenges in Scaling Content Operations

  - [Difficulty in maintaining quality while scaling](https://fathom.video/share/yZ6kpyjqUapYeXEKbokzgp2DGbiXQYKq?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [Constant need for workflow updates due to evolving AI models](https://fathom.video/share/yZ6kpyjqUapYeXEKbokzgp2DGbiXQYKq?tab=summary&timestamp=1026.0)
  - [Balancing client management with operational improvements](https://fathom.video/share/yZ6kpyjqUapYeXEKbokzgp2DGbiXQYKq?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to introduce Ash to VP of Ops and Chief Content Officer](https://fathom.video/share/yZ6kpyjqUapYeXEKbokzgp2DGbiXQYKq?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
  - [Continue discussions post-fundraising period (in a couple of weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/yZ6kpyjqUapYeXEKbokzgp2DGbiXQYKq?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)
  - [Ash to consider the potential of transitioning away from Wellworthy for a full-time role](https://fathom.video/share/yZ6kpyjqUapYeXEKbokzgp2DGbiXQYKq?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)
  - [Explore the possibility of moving at least one of Ash's current clients to GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/yZ6kpyjqUapYeXEKbokzgp2DGbiXQYKq?tab=summary&timestamp=1557.0)
  - [GrowthX to keep Ash updated on self-serve platform developments for potential future collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/yZ6kpyjqUapYeXEKbokzgp2DGbiXQYKq?tab=summary&timestamp=1674.0)
